title: Better PVP - Heycronus
description: Better PVP is a texture pack designed to improve gameplay and make your interface cleaner, more beautiful, and more efficient during battles.
body:
![Better PVP](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7926f57914897fb66a61cb6f69157069daf18e4a.png)

Better PVP - Texture Pack
Take your PVP to the next level with better visibility, precision, and style!
Better PVP is a texture pack designed to improve gameplay and make your interface cleaner, more beautiful, and more efficient during battles.

Key Features:
 

-🎯 Custom Crosshair: Cleaner design for better accuracy.

-🔢 Hotbar with Numbers: Makes item switching faster and easier.🌈 RGB XP Bar: Modern and colorful touch to your interface.

-⚔️ Smaller Swords: Less screen obstruction and more visibility in combat.

-🎃 Pumpkin Clean Vision: Removes the visual obstruction when wearing a carved pumpkin.

-🧱 Improved Block Breaking Bar: Blocks now show more clearly how close they are to breaking.

Perfect for PVP players looking for better performance, agility, and a more beautiful interface.

Download now and upgrade your gameplay!
